title: Excalibur | Trinkets Support
description: A Excalibur themed texture pack for the Trinkets mod
body:
This unofficial compatibility pack ensures that the textures in the [Trinkets](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/trinkets) Mod seamlessly integrate with the amazing [Excalibur](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/excalibur) resource pack.

**Credits:**

*   [Maffhew](https://www.curseforge.com/members/maffhew/projects) – Creator of Excalibur
*   [emilyploszaj](https://www.curseforge.com/members/emilyploszaj/projects) \- Creator of [Trinkets](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/trinkets)
